---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: 'feat(scope): '
labels: enhancement, triage
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What is currently painful or impossible?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope (optional)

Which brick(s) would this affect? (e.g. `dataset`, `registry`, `fleet`)

## Out of scope

What explicitly should NOT be addressed by this feature.

## Additional context

Anything else (mockups, links, related issues).
